title: Agent 007 Completion Signal
description: Written by 007 at exit. Daemon watches for this file to detect completion. Points to the full diagnostic report. Stored at docs/agent-comms/.audit/007-complete-{timestamp}.json.

trigger_timestamp.description: Matches the original activation timestamp — links signal to trigger.

report_path.description: Relative path to the full diagnostic report (e.g., docs/agent-comms/.audit/007-2026-02-21T04-15-00Z.json).
